name: AREthSetProviderEndpoints
title: AREthSetProviderEndpoints
syntax: long AREthSetProviderEndpoints(dword csiHandle, dword remoteIPv4Address, dword remoteUDPPort, dword remoteTCPPort)
description: Sets the UDP and TCP endpoint that is used for the consumed service instance to reach the corresponding provided service instance.

parameters.name: csiHandle
parameters.description: Consumed service instance handle (may be retrieved by AREthGetConsumedObjectHandle)
